about.details:
Version: v{version}
Developer: SiriZhao

A local-first text cleanup, document-structure, and Word/TXT formatting tool.

Project homepage: {repository}

Copyright © 2026 SiriZhao. All rights reserved.
License: MIT License

Basic cleanup is performed locally. AI optimization only calls a third-party API that you configure yourself.
about.license_message: CleanText Studio is distributed under the MIT License. See the repository LICENSE file for the complete text.
about.title: About CleanText Studio
app.title: CleanText Studio
brand.title: CleanText Studio
dialog.ai.title: AI optimization configuration
dialog.exit_confirmation: The result has unsaved changes. Exit anyway?
help.ai.body: AI optimization is optional. Bring your own provider and API key; local cleanup never sends text to an online service.
help.ai.title: AI configuration
help.cleaning.body: Use the preset as a starting point. Each option is local and can be adjusted without changing the source document.
help.cleaning.title: Cleaning settings
help.faq.body: If a document contains unusual markup, review Preview mode and residual warnings before exporting. Complex LaTeX macros may remain readable text.
help.faq.title: FAQ
help.headings.body: The app preserves detected headings and lists so that structured export can recreate them in Word.
help.headings.title: Headings and lists
help.import.body: Open TXT, Markdown, or DOCX files, or paste text from the clipboard. Local cleanup works without a network connection.
help.import.title: Import text
help.math.body: Supported formulas are protected during cleanup. Word export uses native equations when conversion is available and preserves readable fallback text otherwise.
help.math.title: Math formulas
help.paragraphs.body: Choose compact output, section-aware spacing, or preserved paragraph breaks according to your document layout.
help.paragraphs.title: Paragraphs and line breaks
help.privacy.body: Basic cleanup is performed locally. API requests are only made after you explicitly configure and use an AI provider.
help.privacy.title: Privacy and security
help.quick_start.body: Paste or open text, choose a cleaning preset, then select Clean. Use Preview mode to inspect preserved structure before export.
help.quick_start.title: Quick start
help.tables.body: Markdown tables are parsed as document structure. Preview and Word export use the same cleaned table model.
help.tables.title: Tables
help.title: Help
help.word.body: Word export preserves headings, lists, tables, and supported formulas. Review the export summary before saving.
help.word.title: Word export
option.instructional:
Clean fragmented instruction labels
Remove standalone short labels such as Fill in or Click
option.remove_markdown:
Remove Markdown markers
Remove #, **, --- and similar markup
paragraph.smart: Keep breaks only between major sections
placeholder.source: Paste text here, or drop a TXT, Markdown, or Word file
preset.label: Cleaning preset
result.word_tip: Word export is recommended: headings, lists, and tables are preserved.
settings.title: Settings
statistics.summary: This run: Markdown {markdown} · AI labels {ai} · blank lines {blank} · emoji {emoji} · headings {headings} · empty table columns {columns} · {elapsed:.1f} ms
status.cleaned: Cleaning complete · Removed {count} characters · Merged {merged} line breaks
status.outdated: Source text changed; current result may be out of date · Clean again
tip.ai: Use AI to further optimize text
tip.detect_math: Detect LaTeX, Unicode, and common equations before text cleaning.
tip.export_word: Create a structured Word document · Ctrl+Shift+W
tip.math_output: Choose how formulas are represented in cleaned text and TXT output.
tip.new: Create a new text task · Ctrl+N
tip.normalize_math: Fix only clear formula spacing; never calculate or rewrite math.
tip.open: Open TXT, Markdown or Word · Ctrl+O
tip.protect_math: Protect delimiters, subscripts, and commands before Markdown cleaning.
tip.repair_math: Repair a formula delimiter only when the correction is unambiguous.
tip.word_omml: Convert supported formulas to native Word equations; complex formulas use a safe fallback.
